english: Our bodies evolved to draw healing energy from the sun's red and near-infrared light - to fuel cellular function, support skin repair, and promote overall skin health. The problem is that the sun also exposes us to harmful UV and blue light, which can adversely cause skin aging, pigmentation, and DNA damage.
